rationale: Risk tier is assessed as LOW. The sole triggering transaction is a single salary credit of RM5,800.00 on 2026-02-25 from BrightStar Tech Sdn Bhd (EV-002), which is fully consistent with the customer's profile as a Senior Software Engineer with a long-standing account open since 2015 and documented salary credits from the same employer over three years (EV-001). No deterministic high-risk triggers are present: screening returned a clean result with no sanctions match, no PEP match, no high-risk FATF jurisdiction counterparty, and no internal watchlist match (EV-003). No adverse media was identified for either the customer or the counterparty employer (EV-004). There is no structuring pattern — only one transaction is present, well below the RM22,500 threshold. The customer holds a standard KYC tier verified in May 2024 and carries a low risk rating. The overall evidence picture is entirely consistent with legitimate, routine payroll activity, and no red flags of any kind are present.
